# SBA Houston District All SBDC Resource Partners Catalog

## Resource summary
The SBA Houston District resource-partner pages list SBA partners across the district. For SBDC-specific routing, the district pages include SBDC offices such as Lee College, Prairie View A&M, San Jacinto College, University of Houston, Sam Houston State University, Angelina College, Blinn College, Brazosport College, UH Fort Bend County, UH Galveston County, UH Coastal Plains, Lamar University, and UH Brazos Valley.

## BOSS use
Use this catalog when the user is outside ZIP 77084 but still in the broader Houston District/Southeast Texas service area.

## Page 2 source
https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/district?district=35&page=1

## Guardrail
The district listing is not a substitute for asking the user's ZIP/county and using the official locator.
